name: get_stats
description: Retrieve email delivery statistics and engagement metrics. Get insights into bounces, clicks, opens, unsubscribes, spam reports, and other metrics filtered by date range, metric type, and aggregation level. Use for campaign analysis and performance tracking.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date for statistics in YYYY-MM-DD format. Required parameter.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date for statistics in YYYY-MM-DD format. If omitted, uses today's date.

parameters.name: aggregated_by
parameters.description: Aggregation level for results. Options: 'day', 'week', 'month'. Default is 'day'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 500.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip before starting to return data. Use for pagination.

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of categories to filter stats by. Only shows metrics for specified categories.
